name: openmoney-analysis-worker
description: Worker Node.js qui interroge une base Postgres (table sms) et analyse les SMS Mobile Money via regex + LLM, en ecrivant le resultat dans sms_analysis.

scripts.test: node --test src/analysis/providers/extractors.test.js src/analysis/service.test.js src/repos/sms.repo.test.js src/repos/agentChat.repo.test.js src/services/recaptcha.service.test.js src/services/tecnoPartner.client.test.js
